name: vibin
description: Workflow, repo, GitHub, Windows, Paperless, MCP gateway, Jetpack Compose, and SWAG utility skills.

interface.shortDescription: Workflow, repo, GitHub, Windows, Paperless, MCP gateway, and SWAG utilities.
interface.longDescription: Vibin bundles session documentation, repo status and branch/worktree readiness audits, quick-push, GitHub PR review, CI debugging, Windows desktop helpers, screenshot and clipboard workflows, MCP gateway search/execute guidance, Paperless operations, Jetpack Compose guidance, and SWAG config scaffolding.
defaultPrompt: Use Vibin to quick-push this change.
Use Vibin to audit repo branch and worktree status.
Use Vibin to address PR review comments.
